## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to / run '...'
2. Click on / call '...'
3. Scroll down to / send '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include logs, stack traces, or transaction hashes if
applicable.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Go version**: [e.g. 1.25]
- **Node / pnpm version**: [e.g. Node 22, pnpm 10]
- **Network**: [localhost / testnet / Paxeer mainnet]
- **Commit**: [SHA or branch]

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or links here.
